expectations.text: Recommends token-based auth instead of browser login
expectations.evidence: Opens with 'This avoids browser logins entirely' and never suggests railway login

expectations.text: Guides creating a config file with multi-account structure
expectations.evidence: Step 2 shows full config.json creation at ~/.config/railway-cli/config.json with accounts and projects sections

expectations.text: Shows how to add both accounts with distinct names/tokens
expectations.evidence: Config example has 'personal' and 'client' accounts with separate tokens and descriptions

expectations.text: Includes token verification step (railway whoami or similar)
expectations.evidence: Step 3 runs RAILWAY_TOKEN=... railway whoami for both tokens

expectations.text: Shows how to map project directories to specific accounts
expectations.evidence: Step 4 adds project directory entries mapping to account names, Step 5 links each project
